user.title: Docker Lens Setup
user.description: Configure the connection to your Docker daemon. Use `unix:///var/run/docker.sock` for a local socket, or `tcp://192.168.1.x:2375` / `tcp://192.168.1.x:2376` (TLS) for a remote host.

data_description.docker_host: URL of the Docker daemon socket or TCP endpoint.
data_description.tls_ca_cert: Absolute path on the host, e.g. `/config/docker-certs/ca.pem`.
data_description.tls_client_cert: Absolute path on the host, e.g. `/config/docker-certs/cert.pem`.
data_description.tls_client_key: Absolute path on the host, e.g. `/config/docker-certs/key.pem`.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Docker daemon. Verify the host URL, firewall rules, and that the Docker daemon exposes a TCP socket on the remote machine.

abort.already_configured: Docker Lens is already configured. Only one instance is supported.
